hero.css: .hero_001 { --midnight: #080b1f; --sapphire: #101944; --violet: #2c1749; --rose: #f5b9c8; --champagne: #f7dfab; --ivory: #fff8ea; --mist: rgba(255, 248, 234, 0.72); --glass: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.095); position: relative; min-height: 100svh; overflow: hidden; isolation: isolate; display: grid; align-items: stretch; color: var(--ivory); background: radial-gradient(circle at 16% 18%, rgba(245, 185, 200, 0.2) 0 13%, transparent 32%), radial-gradient(circle at 86% 12%, rgba(247, 223, 171, 0.16) 0 10%, transparent 30%), linear-gradient(132deg, var(--midnight) 0%, #0c1230 42%, var(--violet) 100%); font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; } .hero_001::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: -2; background-image: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(255,255,255,0.78) 0 1px, transparent 1.5px), radial-gradient(circle, rgba(247,223,171,0.65) 0 1px, transparent 1.7px), radial-gradient(circle, rgba(245,185,200,0.38) 0 1px, transparent 1.6px); background-size: 92px 92px, 137px 137px, 61px 61px; background-position: 12px 18px, 40px 4px, 22px 50px; opacity: 0.7; animation: hero_001_stardrift 24s linear infinite; } .hero_001::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: auto -14% -35% -14%; height: 54%; z-index: -1; background: radial-gradient(ellipse at center, rgba(245,185,200,0.22) 0%, rgba(247,223,171,0.1) 31%, transparent 68%); filter: blur(18px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(1180px, calc(100% - 56px)); margin: 0 auto; min-height: 100svh; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.04fr 0.96fr; gap: clamp(28px, 5vw, 76px); align-items: center; padding: clamp(34px, 5vw, 74px) 0; position: relative; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { position: relative; z-index: 2; padding-top: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 15px; border: 1px solid rgba(247, 223, 171, 0.3); border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(8, 11, 31, 0.34); box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(14px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(14px); color: rgba(255, 248, 234, 0.86); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow-mark { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--champagne); box-shadow: 0 0 0 6px rgba(247,223,171,0.11), 0 0 26px rgba(247,223,171,0.88); flex: 0 0 auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { margin: clamp(26px, 4vw, 46px) 0 0; font-family: 'Playfair Display', 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: clamp(72px, 9.8vw, 154px); line-height: 0.82; letter-spacing: -0.075em; font-weight: 600; color: var(--ivory); text-shadow: 0 24px 70px rgba(0,0,0,0.36); } .hero_001 .hero_001__title-line { display: block; } .hero_001 .hero_001__amp { display: inline-block; margin: 0 0.08em; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-style: italic; font-weight: 400; color: var(--rose); transform: translateY(-0.03em); text-shadow: 0 0 32px rgba(245,185,200,0.38); } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { margin: clamp(22px, 3vw, 34px) 0 0; width: min(660px, 100%); color: var(--mist); font-size: clamp(16px, 1.5vw, 19px); line-height: 1.75; letter-spacing: 0.005em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { margin-top: clamp(28px, 4vw, 46px); display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 14px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail { border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.13); background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.11), rgba(255,255,255,0.045)); border-radius: 22px; padding: 15px 18px; min-width: 172px; box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail-kicker { display: block; color: rgba(247,223,171,0.72); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 7px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail-value { display: block; color: rgba(255,248,234,0.94); font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 23px; line-height: 1.05; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { position: relative; min-height: min(70svh, 690px); display: grid; place-items: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__constellation { position: absolute; inset: 2% 0 0 2%; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 50%, rgba(255,255,255,0.06), transparent 56%); opacity: 0.95; } .hero_001 .hero_001__orbit { position: absolute; inset: 8%; border: 1px solid rgba(247,223,171,0.18); border-radius: 50%; transform: rotate(-16deg); } .hero_001 .hero_001__orbit:nth-child(2) { inset: 17% 4%; border-color: rgba(245,185,200,0.16); transform: rotate(23deg); } .hero_001 .hero_001__orbit:nth-child(3) { inset: 3% 18%; border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.1); transform: rotate(58deg); } .hero_001 .hero_001__star { position: absolute; width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--champagne); box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(247,223,171,0.8); } .hero_001 .hero_001__star:nth-child(4) { top: 17%; left: 62%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__star:nth-child(5) { top: 63%; left: 18%; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--rose); box-shadow: 0 0 22px rgba(245,185,200,0.75); } .hero_001 .hero_001__star:nth-child(6) { top: 78%; left: 78%; width: 5px; height: 5px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__moon { width: clamp(250px, 31vw, 430px); aspect-ratio: 1; border-radius: 50%; position: relative; background: radial-gradient(circle at 34% 28%, #fffdf4 0 8%, #f8e8bb 21%, #d7b670 58%, #8b6595 100%); box-shadow: inset -34px -42px 80px rgba(55, 33, 82, 0.5), inset 28px 26px 62px rgba(255,255,255,0.22), 0 0 0 1px rgba(247,223,171,0.22), 0 28px 95px rgba(245,185,200,0.22), 0 0 130px rgba(247,223,171,0.19); animation: hero_001_float 7s ease-in-out infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__moon::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 8%; border-radius: inherit; background: radial-gradient(circle at 68% 24%, rgba(91,67,115,0.2) 0 7%, transparent 8%), radial-gradient(circle at 36% 64%, rgba(91,67,115,0.16) 0 11%, transparent 12%), radial-gradient(circle at 58% 76%, rgba(255,255,255,0.16) 0 8%, transparent 9%); mix-blend-mode: multiply; opacity: 0.68; } .hero_001 .hero_001__moon::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: -18%; border-radius: inherit; background: conic-gradient(from 18deg, transparent 0 18%, rgba(247,223,171,0.2) 24%, transparent 31%, transparent 56%, rgba(245,185,200,0.18) 63%, transparent 72%, transparent 100%); filter: blur(1px); animation: hero_001_turn 18s linear infinite; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-panel { position: absolute; right: clamp(4px, 2vw, 28px); bottom: clamp(24px, 6vw, 72px); width: min(310px, 72%); border: 1px solid rgba(247,223,171,0.28); border-radius: 34px; padding: 24px 24px 22px; background: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.13), rgba(255,255,255,0.055)); box-shadow: 0 28px 90px rgba(0,0,0,0.32); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-panel::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.09); border-radius: 24px; pointer-events: none; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-month { display: block; color: rgba(247,223,171,0.76); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.28em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-day { display: block; margin-top: 8px; font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif; font-size: clamp(58px, 6vw, 86px); line-height: 0.88; letter-spacing: -0.06em; color: var(--ivory); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-year { display: block; margin-top: 10px; color: rgba(255,248,234,0.72); font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue { margin-top: 18px; padding-top: 18px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); color: rgba(255,248,234,0.78); font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.55; } .hero_001 .hero_001__venue strong { display: block; color: var(--ivory); font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 500; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arc-text { position: absolute; left: clamp(0px, 2vw, 24px); top: clamp(24px, 7vw, 78px); width: 154px; height: 154px; border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid rgba(245,185,200,0.2); display: grid; place-items: center; color: rgba(247,223,171,0.72); font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; text-align: center; line-height: 1.65; background: rgba(8,11,31,0.22); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__arc-text::before { content: ''; width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(247,223,171,0.95) 0 18%, transparent 20%), radial-gradient(circle, rgba(247,223,171,0.16), transparent 70%); box-shadow: 0 0 34px rgba(247,223,171,0.4); position: absolute; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arc-copy { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll { position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: clamp(20px, 4vw, 42px); display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 13px; color: rgba(255,248,234,0.5); font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.22em; text-transform: uppercase; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll-line { width: 54px; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(247,223,171,0.8), transparent); } @keyframes hero_001_float { 0%, 100% { transform: translate3d(0, 0, 0) scale(1); } 50% { transform: translate3d(0, -16px, 0) scale(1.015); } } @keyframes hero_001_turn { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } @keyframes hero_001_stardrift { to { background-position: 104px 110px, 177px 141px, 83px 111px; } } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(100% - 42px, 760px); grid-template-columns: 1fr; align-content: center; gap: 18px; padding: 54px 0 86px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__content { text-align: center; padding-top: 0; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { margin: 0 auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { margin-left: auto; margin-right: auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { justify-content: center; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 470px; width: min(620px, 100%); margin: 0 auto; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arc-text { left: 4%; top: 10%; width: 128px; height: 128px; font-size: 9px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-panel { right: 4%; bottom: 5%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll { left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); bottom: 26px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001 { min-height: 100svh; } .hero_001 .hero_001__wrap { width: min(100% - 28px, 460px); padding: 32px 0 78px; gap: 12px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__eyebrow { max-width: 100%; padding: 9px 12px; font-size: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.12em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__title { font-size: clamp(58px, 18vw, 86px); line-height: 0.88; letter-spacing: -0.065em; margin-top: 24px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__subtitle { font-size: 14.5px; line-height: 1.65; margin-top: 19px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__details { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-top: 24px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail { min-width: 0; padding: 13px 16px; border-radius: 18px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__detail-value { font-size: 21px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__visual { min-height: 390px; margin-top: -4px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__moon { width: min(76vw, 310px); } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-panel { width: min(280px, 86%); right: 50%; transform: translateX(50%); bottom: 0; border-radius: 26px; padding: 20px 20px 18px; text-align: left; } .hero_001 .hero_001__date-day { font-size: 60px; } .hero_001 .hero_001__arc-text { width: 104px; height: 104px; left: 0; top: 5%; font-size: 8px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; } .hero_001 .hero_001__orbit { inset: 13%; } .hero_001 .hero_001__scroll { display: none; } }
hero.designNotes: A romantic celestial-night luxury hero with moonlit gradients, glassmorphism date details, custom constellation art, and dramatic editorial typography. The design honors the couple’s Gujarati wedding message through copy while keeping the visual language modern and non-iconographic.
hero.html:
March 22, 2026 • Somerset, New Jersey

Kavya &Mihir

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.

CelebrationGujarati Wedding
VenueAkshar Grand Palace
Under the same stars
March22Two Thousand Twenty Six
Akshar Grand PalaceSomerset, New Jersey
Celebrate with us
